name: llm-guard-kit
summary: v0.47.0: Phase A extended to 8 datasets; DeBERTa-v3-small encoder option; EnsembleMechanismClassifier (mechanism+SC_OLD joint features); 3 new loaders (pubmed_qa, context_drift, arc_research). Finding: text signals detect hallucination (AUROC=0.96) not reasoning errors (AUROC~0.53). Mamba-CPC workshop paper draft.
author: Avighan Majumder
